chunks.text: Last Saturday, at the school library, I found a book that I will never forget.
“ This is a book that contains stories which stay in your heart for a long time,” I said to Tom.
The main character is a girl who loves books more than anything.
Every day, she walks to school through a forest.
On another shelf, there are books which have beautiful pictures of animals.
The colors are so warm that they stay in my mind.
In the far corner of the library
there are tools that were used more than a hundred years ago.
When I choose a book, I always look closely at the cover and the title.
I love the quiet time that I spend choosing one.
